# Third-party source notices

Galactic Wars includes adapted character art from the following repositories:

- `Pyrix25633/Forge-StarWarsCloneWars` at
  `c9555aa4966e9e63c22a59f488d4b05bc614569e`, licensed GPL-3.0 and used with
  additional explicit permission from the Galactic Wars project owner.
- `Parzivail-Modding-Team/GalaxiesParzisStarWarsMod` at
  `b91b4cc1a827eeb7c2ae16f0b703affd78c1c206`. Its README declares code under
  LGPL-3.0 and non-code assets under CC-BY-SA 4.0.

The adapted Galaxies character art is distributed under CC-BY-SA 4.0 with attribution to the
Parzivail Modding Team and the upstream contributors. Galactic Wars transformations are shared under
the same terms where the ShareAlike requirement applies.

Source paths and transformations are recorded in
`docs/authorized-source-intake.md`. The original repositories remain the preferred
corresponding source for the unmodified upstream files; exact inputs used by the build are
also retained under `tools/source_art/authorized_upstream`.
